description_long: This object consists of two adjacent wooden benches, each featuring a slatted backrest and seat, with armrests on both ends. The benches are constructed from dark-stained wood, giving them a classic, rustic appearance suitable for parks or public spaces. The slats on the backrest and seat are evenly spaced, providing both comfort and ventilation. The legs are sturdy and straight, supporting the benches securely above the ground. The benches are positioned in a slightly staggered arrangement, suggesting modularity or the ability to accommodate groups. The overall design is robust and functional, with a focus on durability and comfort for multiple users.
description: A pair of dark wooden benches with slatted backs and seats, armrests on both sides, and a sturdy, classic design. The benches are arranged side by side, suitable for outdoor public seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of both benches, highlighting the slatted backrests, seats, and armrests.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth of the benches, the thickness of the wooden slats, and the armrest profiles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back slats and the structural support of the benches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bench profiles and the arrangement of the legs and armrests.
attribute_leg_design: four straight wooden legs per bench
